creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
On Fri, 31 Dec 1999, Jay Krell wrote:

> I still think the ports system should handle fetch failure
> better than by filling up the proc table..
> 

The ports system handles failure fine, until you use make(1) flags that
tell it not to (-i).

-----
Chris D. Faulhaber - jedgar@fxp.org - jedgar@FreeBSD.org
